metadata.title: Sepela Group | Enterprise Technology Solutions
metadata.description: Sepela Group builds production-grade media, retail, and event infrastructure for enterprises across Africa and beyond.

hero.title: Experience the Future of Enterprise Technology
hero.lead: Comprehensive digital solutions tailored to your business — production-grade platforms engineered with cutting-edge technology and enterprise reliability.

products.heading: Key Products
products.description: Discover how our comprehensive suite of production applications revolutionizes media, retail, and event operations.
products.empty: Products will appear here once published in the admin panel.

capabilities.heading: Bespoke Services
capabilities.description: Beyond our product suite, we design and deliver custom solutions that integrate seamlessly with your existing infrastructure.

customApps.title: Custom App Development
customApps.subtitle: Web, Mobile & Desktop
customApps.description: Bespoke applications engineered for your workflows — from responsive web platforms to native mobile utilities and desktop tooling.

automation.title: Business & Process Automation
automation.subtitle: Industrial & Workflow Scripts
automation.description: Eliminate manual bottlenecks with intelligent automation pipelines, industrial integrations, and custom workflow orchestration.

cloud.title: Cloud Computing & Scaling
cloud.subtitle: High-Availability Infrastructure
cloud.description: Design, deploy, and manage resilient cloud infrastructure with auto-scaling, failover, and performance optimization baked in.

team.heading: Engineering excellence
team.description: A multidisciplinary team delivering production systems with the rigor, reliability, and precision enterprise clients demand.

fullstack.title: Full-Stack Architecture
fullstack.description: End-to-end system design spanning React, Next.js, mobile runtimes, and resilient API layers built for long-term maintainability.

devops.title: Cloud & Infrastructure DevOps
devops.description: Production-grade cloud deployments with container orchestration, CI/CD pipelines, and observability across multi-region environments.

automation.title: Automation Engineering
automation.description: Custom automation frameworks that connect legacy systems, orchestrate workflows, and eliminate operational friction at scale.

news.heading: News Updates
news.description: Company announcements, partnerships, product launches, and stories from the Sepela Group team.
news.empty: No news articles published yet. Check back soon.
news.pageDescription: Latest company news, partnerships, product launches, and updates from Sepela Group.
news.heroDescription: Announcements, partnerships, and stories from across Sepela Group.
news.noArticlesDescription: Try another search term or check back later for new updates.

contact.heading: Ready to transform your operations?
contact.title: Get in touch with us
contact.description: Fill out the form below, and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.successDescription: Our team will reach out shortly to confirm your consultation.

placeholders.projectBrief: Describe your goals, timeline, and technical requirements...

validation.interestRequired: Select a product or service of interest.
validation.briefMin: Provide at least 20 characters describing your project.

errors.submitFailed: Submission failed. Please review your entries.

common.notFoundDescription: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

errors.invalidJson: Request body must be valid JSON.
errors.adminSessionSecretMissing: Admin login is not ready: set ADMIN_SESSION_SECRET (32+ characters) in server environment variables.
errors.adminPasswordMissing: Admin login is not ready: set a strong ADMIN_PASSWORD in server environment variables.
errors.invalidImageType: Only JPG, PNG, and WebP images are allowed.
errors.contactSaveFailed: We could not save your request right now. Please try again.
errors.contactRateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait before submitting again.
errors.databaseUnavailable: Database is temporarily unreachable. Verify your Neon pooled DATABASE_URL and network connection.
errors.databaseNotConfigured: DATABASE_URL is not set. Using local JSON data until Neon is configured.

validation.fullNameMin: Full name must be at least 2 characters.
validation.companyNameMin: Company name must be at least 2 characters.
validation.emailInvalid: A valid business email is required.
validation.briefMin: Project brief must be at least 20 characters.
validation.invalidInterest: Select a valid product or service.
validation.urlInvalidOrBlank: Enter a valid URL or leave blank.
validation.newsTitleMin: Title must be at least 5 characters.
validation.newsExcerptMin: Excerpt must be at least 20 characters.
validation.newsContentMin: Article content must be at least 50 characters.
validation.productNameMin: Product name must be at least 2 characters.
validation.productTaglineMin: Tagline must be at least 2 characters.
validation.productDescriptionMin: Short description must be at least 20 characters.
validation.productContentMin: Product details must be at least 20 characters.
validation.productFeatureMin: Each feature must be at least 2 characters.
validation.productFeaturesRequired: At least one feature is required.
validation.productFeaturesMax: A maximum of 8 features is allowed.
validation.settingsEmailInvalid: A valid email address is required.
validation.settingsPhoneMin: Phone number must be at least 5 characters.
validation.settingsAddressMin: Address must be at least 2 characters.
validation.settingsCityMin: City must be at least 2 characters.
validation.settingsCountryMin: Country must be at least 2 characters.
validation.settingsTaglineMin: Footer tagline must be at least 10 characters.

login.title: Admin Login
login.description: Sign in to publish and manage company news articles.

database.notConfigured: DATABASE_URL is not set. Using local JSON data until Neon is configured.
database.unavailable: Database is temporarily unreachable. Verify your Neon pooled DATABASE_URL and network connection.

news.listDescription: Create, edit, and publish company updates.
news.empty: No articles yet. Create your first update.
news.contentPlaceholder: Write paragraphs separated by a blank line.
news.createPageDescription: Write a company update, upload images, and publish it to the website.
news.editPageDescription: Update the article content, images, and publication status.

products.listDescription: Manage product listings, images, and detail pages.
products.empty: No products yet. Create your first product.
products.contentPlaceholder: Write paragraphs separated by a blank line.
products.createPageDescription: Add a product listing with images and detail page content.
products.editPageDescription: Update product details, images, and publication status.
products.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

contacts.title: Contact Submissions
contacts.description: Messages received from the website contact form.

address.title: Address & Contact Details
address.description: Update contact details, footer text, and social media links shown on the website.
address.socialDescription: Add full profile URLs. Leave blank to hide a platform from the footer.
address.success: Site contact and social details updated.
